profile.name: Jyotiradityasinh Chauhan
profile.tagline: Building systems where security, data, and people intersect.

about.title: Quiet Builder
paragraphs: CS student at the University of Houston with a focus on operational technology security, full-stack systems, and applied AI. I like work that sits at the intersection of real infrastructure and the people who depend on it.
Outside the terminal: Agora coffee, Houston at night, basketball courts, and the kind of minimal design that lets the details breathe — Margiela restraint, Diptyque warmth.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

experience.title: Cybersecurity Intern
bullets: Piloted a SQL-backed (SQLite) vulnerability management pipeline at a live LyondellBasell site, automating ingestion of asset and vulnerability data via a Python poller pulling delta updates from Claroty CTD's REST API in near real-time.

Engineered a CVSS v3.1 environmental recast engine that re-scores NVD base vulnerability ratings against OT-specific exploitability constraints, correcting for IT-centric scoring assumptions on segmented Process Control Network assets.

Authored an end-to-end vulnerability management playbook covering identify-prioritize-remediate process, Claroty CTD configuration, and a four-table relational schema feeding a BI dashboard — scaling the pilot toward all 45 sites.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Built and shipped a full-stack web application with a GPU-hosted LLM backend integrated into Canvas LMS via Python/FastAPI; designed the end-to-end data pipeline — ingestion, inference (sglang), and response delivery — serving 100+ active users.
Instrumented the system with structured logging and query analytics; performed systematic troubleshooting to iterate on pipeline performance and reduce latency under real production load.

experience.title: AI/ML Intern
bullets: Accelerated POC delivery by 30% by building reusable Python, C#, and JavaScript frameworks alongside lightweight ETL pipelines, enabling faster data modeling and product experimentation.
Wrote complex queries and data transformation logic across large datasets to surface trends and drive recommendations; authored system diagrams and technical documentation.

experience.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Designed structured labs covering data structures, algorithms, operating systems, and computer architecture for 100+ students, improving debugging efficiency by 25%.
Applied a data-informed approach to iteratively refine content each semester, leading live coding sessions and gathering feedback to improve learning outcomes.

projects.name: Embedded Systems Network Monitor
projects.tech: C++, Python, firmware interfaces, embedded systems
bullets: Developed a lightweight C++ network monitoring agent targeting embedded systems with constrained resources; interfaced with firmware-level diagnostics to capture real-time telemetry.
Built a Python dashboard to visualize packet-level data and system health metrics, reducing processing overhead by 30% on low-power hardware targets.

projects.name: Large-Scale Log Analytics Pipeline
projects.tech: Splunk, SPL, Python, SQL, JavaScript, D3.js
bullets: Built SPL correlation searches, interactive dashboards (JavaScript/D3.js), and alerting pipelines in Splunk; reduced simulated intrusion investigation time by 25%.
Authored end-to-end data workflows from raw log ingestion to structured dashboards, standardizing evidence collection across multi-source datasets.

extracurriculars.title: Information Security Lead
bullets: Designed and led hands-on Wireshark workshops for 30+ students, growing weekly attendance 25% through iterative content design.
Translated dense technical datasets and packet-level analysis into engaging, structured learning experiences.

skills.Languages: Python, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, R
skills.Systems: Embedded systems, firmware interfaces, operating systems, computer architecture, distributed computing
skills.Operational Technology: Claroty CTD, OT/ICS security, Purdue Model network segmentation, Process Control Networks, CVSS v3.1, EPSS
skills.Data & Visualization: ETL pipelines, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Tableau, Power BI, Splunk
skills.Backend / Infra: FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Git, Redis, REST APIs, JWT authentication
skills.AI / ML: LLMs, RAG, inference optimization, sglang, benchmarking

zones.label: Agora Coffee
zones.hint: Home base — order a coffee, find contact info
